item.title: Amazon Nova 2: Multimodal Reasoning and Generation Models
item.description: A family of multimodal reasoning and generation models from Amazon AGI.

item.title: Humanity's Last Exam
item.description: A large-scale collaborative benchmark designed to test the limits of frontier AI systems.

item.title: A Systematic Survey and Critical Review on Evaluating Large Language Models: Challenges, Limitations, and Recommendations
item.description: A systematic survey and critical review on evaluating large language models with recommendations for more rigorous evaluation.

item.title: SPT: Semi-Parametric Prompt Tuning for Multitask Prompted Learning
item.description: A semi-parametric prompt tuning method improving multitask generalization for parameter-efficient fine-tuning with cross-task zero-shot generalization.
